query:
-- Get user and organization info
SET @user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%deji%' OR name LIKE '%deji%' LIMIT 1);
SET @org_id = (SELECT organizationId FROM users WHERE id = @user_id LIMIT 1);

-- Insert a test project if it doesn't exist
INSERT INTO projects (name, code, organization_id, totalBudget, spentBudget, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Test Invoice Project', 'TEST-INV-001', @org_id, 10000.00, 0.00, 'active', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = name;

-- Get the project ID
SET @project_id = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'TEST-INV-001' LIMIT 1);

-- Insert a completed test session
INSERT INTO sessions (
  projectId,
  title,
  description,
  startTime,
  endTime,
  venue,
  status,
  paymentPerFacilitator,
  isVirtual,
  createdById,
  organizationId,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  @project_id,
  'Test Session for Invoice',
  'This is a test session to verify invoice generation works correctly',
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY),
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR,
  'Test Venue',
  'completed',
  75.00,
  0,
  @user_id,
  @org_id,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Get the session ID
SET @session_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- Add the user as a facilitator
INSERT INTO session_facilitators (sessionId, userId, createdAt)
VALUES (@session_id, @user_id, NOW());

-- Record attendance
INSERT INTO attendance (
  sessionId,
  userId,
  joinedAt,
  leftAt,
  durationMinutes,
  wasLate,
  calculatedPayment,
  organizationId,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  @session_id,
  @user_id,
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY),
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR,
  60,
  0,
  '75.00',
  @org_id,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify the data
SELECT 
  s.id as session_id,
  s.title,
  s.status,
  s.paymentPerFacilitator,
  a.id as attendance_id,
  a.durationMinutes,
  a.calculatedPayment,
  u.name as user_name
FROM sessions s
JOIN attendance a ON s.id = a.sessionId
JOIN users u ON a.userId = u.id
WHERE s.id = @session_id;
